title: SSID Open-Core Export Sync Manifest
description: Schema for export sync manifests produced by the open-core derivation sync validator. Each manifest captures the synchronization state between the canonical SSID repository and its derivative SSID-open-core repository.

scan_time_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the export sync scan.

contract_path.description: Repo-relative path to the SoT contract used for this scan.

contract_version.description: Semantic version of the SoT contract.

contract_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the SoT contract file at scan time.

derivation_mode.description: Mode of derivation as defined in the export policy.

allowed_exports.description: List of canonical artifact paths that are allowed for export (not denied by policy).

actual_exports.description: List of artifact paths actually present in the derivative repository.

missing_exports.description: List of allowed canonical artifacts that are absent from the derivative.

forbidden_exports.description: List of derivative artifacts that match deny-glob patterns (policy violations).

stale_bindings.description: List of derivative artifacts that are stale relative to their canonical counterpart.

registry_binding_status.description: Consistency status of registry bindings between canonical and derivative.

findings.description: All sync findings detected during the validation scan.

evidence_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the manifest evidence payload for audit trails.

path.description: Repo-relative path of the stale artifact.

canonical_mtime.description: Last modification time of the canonical file (ISO 8601 UTC).

derivative_mtime.description: Last modification time of the derivative file (ISO 8601 UTC).

path.description: File path related to the finding.
